• Customers
    • Participants
    • Network Status
    • Docs
Operator
Node operator name
 
Query Processed
The total number of requests processed by the operator.
 
Query Fees
The total fees earned by the operator for processing queries.
 
Rewards Earned
The total operating rewards earned by operator
 
Delegators Earned
The total amount of rewards earned by the delegators over time.
 
Owned
The total BCUT staked by the operator.
 
Delegated
The amount of BCUT staked by the delegator to the operator. This cannot be slashed
 
Query Fee Cut
The % of query fees rebate that the operator keep. The remaining is given to the delegators.
 
Effective Reward Cut
The % of the reward cut the operator will keep. The remaining is given to the delegators.

10 of 48 Entries
Delegator
Delegators address.
 
Delegated Operators
Operators the delegator is delegating to
 
Delegated Amount
The total amount of BCUT staked by this delegator in the network
 
Rewards Earned
The total amount of BCUT accumulated by the delegator through delegating to operators
 
Fee Earned
The total amount of BCUT accumulated by the delegator as part of the query fee rebate shared by the operators
 
First Delegated
The date of the first delegation
